description: First-run setup — ThejaD never stores secret values; only checks env / reachability.

items.label: LOLC monorepo root
items.help: Set THEJAD_REPO_ROOT to internetBanking root (AGENTS.md present) or run from that folder.

items.label: Inference (Ollama, LAN pod mesh, or Hyperspace gateway)
items.help: Local Ollama (11434), OR team pod with peers (thejad pod serve + thejad_pod_bootstrap), OR HYPERSPACE_GATEWAY_URL reachable.

items.label: Cursor / host LLM (online)
items.help: You are already in Cursor — this is the online orchestration brain.

items.label: OpenAI API (optional online)
items.help: Optional — export OPENAI_API_KEY for extra online models.

items.label: Anthropic API (optional online)
items.help: Optional if not using Cursor subscription only.

items.label: NotebookLM CLI login
items.help: pip install notebooklm-py — run: notebooklm login (interactive OAuth)

items.label: Figma token + file (UI sync)
items.help: FIGMA_ACCESS_TOKEN + FIGMA_FILE_KEY or FIGMA_FILE_URL — live Figma API in figma_context / orchestra.

items.label: Extra device scan paths (e.g. D: drive)
